text_raw: What should I do...
text_clean: What should I do...

text_raw: I know all things must pass...
text_clean: I know all things must pass...

text_raw: I cannot simply do nothing...
text_clean: I cannot simply do nothing...

text_raw: Have you come seeking wisdom?
text_clean: Have you come seeking wisdom?

text_raw: Forgive my lack of a welcome...
text_clean: Forgive my lack of a welcome...

text_raw: An unfortunate affair has left the temple in ruins.
text_clean: An unfortunate affair has left the temple in ruins.

text_raw: I hope you understand.
text_clean: I hope you understand.

text_raw: Oh, the list is endless.
text_clean: Oh, the list is endless.

text_raw: But I'm concerned about the pensive statues.
text_clean: But I'm concerned about the pensive statues.

text_raw: I know attachment to material things brings suffering, but...
text_clean: I know attachment to material things brings suffering, but...

text_raw: they represent something dear to us.
text_clean: they represent something dear to us.

text_raw: Would you be so kind as to check if they remain untouched?
text_clean: Would you be so kind as to check if they remain untouched?

text_raw: Is there anything I can do to help?
text_clean: Is there anything I can do to help?

text_raw: There's so much to be mended...
text_clean: There's so much to be mended...

text_raw: You're back. How are the statues?
text_clean: You're back. How are the statues?

text_raw: Thank you, that's a weight off my shoulders.
text_clean: Thank you, that's a weight off my shoulders.

text_raw: Ah, so you've met him.
text_clean: Ah, so you've met him.

text_raw: The reason the temple is in ruins.
text_clean: The reason the temple is in ruins.

text_raw: He abandoned enlightenment to pursue strength.
text_clean: He abandoned enlightenment to pursue strength.

text_raw: And you walked away unharmed?
text_clean: And you walked away unharmed?

text_raw: You should try out our training course.
text_clean: You should try out our training course.

text_raw: Seek enlightenment and help us guide him back to the right path.
text_clean: Seek enlightenment and help us guide him back to the right path.

text_raw: They're all restored.
text_clean: They're all restored.

text_raw: I ran into someone wearing a mask.
text_clean: I ran into someone wearing a mask.

text_raw: Aye, he attacked me when I doubted him.
text_clean: Aye, he attacked me when I doubted him.

text_raw: I'll see what I can do.
text_clean: I'll see what I can do.

text_raw: Ah, you're here!
text_clean: Ah, you're here!

text_raw: That old man sent you, didn't he?
text_clean: That old man sent you, didn't he?

text_raw: Still going on about "all is one" and all that hogwash, I bet.
text_clean: Still going on about "all is one" and all that hogwash, I bet.

text_raw: One or two, who cares? It's all too complicated for me.
text_clean: One or two, who cares? It's all too complicated for me.

text_raw: Anyway, getting here couldn't have been easy.
text_clean: Anyway, getting here couldn't have been easy.

text_raw: Then breathe, let your head cool a while!
text_clean: Then breathe, let your head cool a while!

text_raw: Guidance? What do you need that for?
text_clean: Guidance? What do you need that for?

text_raw: You're doing well enough on your own.
text_clean: You're doing well enough on your own.

text_raw: I like you just the way you are, don't you?
text_clean: I like you just the way you are, don't you?

text_raw: Good or bad, life goes on, so it's best to just go with the flow.
text_clean: Good or bad, life goes on, so it's best to just go with the flow.

text_raw: Try too hard and you'll just trip over your own feet.
text_clean: Try too hard and you'll just trip over your own feet.

text_raw: Stop overthinking and just keep doing what you do.
text_clean: Stop overthinking and just keep doing what you do.

text_raw: Go help a few lost souls and you'll see what I mean.
text_clean: Go help a few lost souls and you'll see what I mean.

text_raw: That'll teach you a real lesson.
text_clean: That'll teach you a real lesson.

text_raw: May peace and light be with you.
text_clean: May peace and light be with you.

text_raw: I was told I could find guidance here...
text_clean: I was told I could find guidance here...

text_raw: I'm not sure...
text_clean: I'm not sure...

text_raw: Wait... I still have...
text_clean: Wait... I still have...

text_raw: Those who find enlightenment must soften their powers with mercy and wisdom.
text_clean: Those who find enlightenment must soften their powers with mercy and wisdom.

text_raw: Strength always carries duty.
text_clean: Strength always carries duty.

text_raw: Only a steady, balanced mind can guide you.
text_clean: Only a steady, balanced mind can guide you.

text_raw: And remember, strength and power grow from the root of humility.
text_clean: And remember, strength and power grow from the root of humility.

text_raw: If you must persist with your wicked ways,
text_clean: If you must persist with your wicked ways,

text_raw: I will set you on the righteous path.
text_clean: I will set you on the righteous path.

text_raw: Justice is wrought by the hands of the strong!
text_clean: Justice is wrought by the hands of the strong!

text_raw: That is the truth of this world.
text_clean: That is the truth of this world.

text_raw: Do you not understand me?
text_clean: Do you not understand me?

text_raw: I think he's bloody ignoring me.
text_clean: I think he's bloody ignoring me.

text_raw: Bet he fancies himself a saint.
text_clean: Bet he fancies himself a saint.

text_raw: You stinking rat!
text_clean: You stinking rat!

text_raw: Go on, speak!
text_clean: Go on, speak!

text_raw: Those without strength have no right to speak of justice.
text_clean: Those without strength have no right to speak of justice.

text_raw: One needs power to realize one's ideals.
text_clean: One needs power to realize one's ideals.

text_raw: Justice without power is but a hollow cry.
text_clean: Justice without power is but a hollow cry.

text_raw: None pay attention to such weakness.
text_clean: None pay attention to such weakness.

text_raw: The voice of the powerless is but a whisper!
text_clean: The voice of the powerless is but a whisper!

text_raw: Silence the powerless!
text_clean: Silence the powerless!

text_raw: Pathetic wretch, fleeing without faith!
text_clean: Pathetic wretch, fleeing without faith!

text_raw: Listen to me!
text_clean: Listen to me!

text_raw: True strength...
text_clean: True strength...

text_raw: can only come from humility.
text_clean: can only come from humility.

text_raw: Those are your master's words.
text_clean: Those are your master's words.
